parsed_review.summary: Independent read-only review of CP00-636 (Risk C, 150 units, RP20.P06.M06.S11-RP20.P07.M02.S12) confirms the descriptor-only Data Room/VDR P06/P07 fixture-failure bridge pack is sound and its production_ready candidacy (descriptor-verified, not runtime-open) is supported by implementation, tests, local validation, and boundary attestations. Implementation: the freeze chain (service.js:225) and DATA_ROOM_VDR_CORE_CP636_NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION (registry.js:1677) establish comprehensive no-write/no-real-data invariants; validators.js:3844 asserts synthetic_only, no_real_data, writes_product_state===false, all dispatches_*/executes_*_runtime===false, and emits_hermes_runtime_receipt===false. Distribution integrity: deliverable counts (registry.js:1405) sum to 150 and match the prompt; section-row constants reproduce the micro-title distribution exactly (12/22/22/22/20/20/20/12=150); expected_section_count=8 and expected_unit_count=150 match. Hermes boundary: createDataRoomVdrCoreCp636HermesEvidencePacket (validators.js:3899) yields a descriptor-only evidence packet with emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false — deterministic control-plane review/receipt handling, not product runtime. Claude boundary: review packet is read_only with claude_is_final_approval=false; authority_boundary requires human approval for runtime opening; forbidden_review_evidence (registry.js:1724) covers all CP178+ hardening rejections (auth failure, 0-byte stdout, malformed/fenced JSON, tool-call-shaped output, missing fields, final-approval/enterprise-trust claims). Tests/validation: model.test.js carries three CP636 tests (coverage, descriptor-only boundaries, contract-projection parity); the contract projections (cp636_pack_binding/requirements/no_write_attestation/descriptor) exist and the validator script deep-equals them against the live descriptor; command-evidence records all commands exit 0. Review hardening: readiness auth-preflight passed with valid JSON; review-request uses claude-opus-4-8/max/read-only/Read,Grep,Glob; validation-report confirms no forbidden tools and summary-only prohibited. Plan/queue consistently show CP00-636 live with handoff to CP00-637 at RP20.P07.M02.S13. Pending adjudication/inspection/claude-review-result states reflect correct pre-review sequencing rather than defects, and unrelated dirty files are properly scoped out. No P0-P3 findings; Claude remains a read-only independent reviewer and not the final approval authority.
